textPlain: I posted this 23 days ago -https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=46100511I've been enjoying past discussion threads on HN, currently in 2012.Interesting conversations about how Facebook would fail back then, lol, and about how Bitcoin would not be as valuable as it is today. Who would have known?Great site, this.
I would love to see an effort to amass these corpora of knowledge into zim files for offline consumption, similar to stackoverflow et al.https://library.kiwix.org
There must be a vbulletin version too!
And if you do find an old php message board, absolutely do not add  ?topic=../../../../etc/passwd
